title: Measurement Category
description: Coarse classification for vendor-defined measurement metrics. Used at two levels: (a) for AAO-side cross-vendor discovery — buyers querying 'which vendors offer attention measurement?' filter against `brand.json` measurement-agent `metric_categories[]` for cheap pre-call filtering, and (b) on each metric in the measurement agent's `get_adcp_capabilities.measurement.metrics[]` for semantic categorization. Closed enum chosen for stability — buyers can write category-based queries that don't break when a new vendor enters the market with a slightly different category label.
